function.name: percentage_calc
function.description: Calculate the percentage of a part relative to a whole
function.long_description: Calculates the percentage by dividing the part by the whole and multiplying by 100. Useful for determining the percentage representation of a subset in relation to a total.
example_user_queries: Calculate the percentage for part 18 and whole 72.
How much percent is 27 out of 60?
Compute percentage where part is 125 and whole is 500.
What percentage does 9 represent out of 12?
Calculate the percent of 250 out of 2000.
Find the percentage for 66 out of 120.
Tell me what percent 14 is of 56.
Work out percentage_calc with part 7 and whole 28.
